title: Golden Roasted Malaysian Kimchi Flatbread
description: A roasted, velvety, kid-friendly Malaysian dish featuring bread flour and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This Whole30-friendly flatbread is a delicious and healthy option for the whole family.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine bread flour, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add kimchi to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a flat disk using a rolling pin.
Brush the tops with coconut oil and egg wash.
Place the flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
